_说明: 修改此文件更新网站内容。添加论文：在 papers 数组中复制一个条目并修改。添加讲义：在对应课程的 notes 数组中添加条目。status 字段可选值：job_market_paper / working_paper / revise_resubmit / forthcoming / published

profile.bio_en:
I am a PhD candidate in Economics at the School of Economics, Renmin University of China. My research focuses on macroeconomics.

I received my B.S. in Economics from the School of Statistics, University of International Business and Economics (UIBE).
profile.bio_zh:
我是中国人民大学经济学院经济学博士候选人，研究方向为宏观经济学。

本科毕业于对外经济贸易大学统计学院，获经济学学士学位。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Transmission and Household Heterogeneity: Evidence from China
papers.abstract_en: This paper studies how monetary policy shocks propagate through the economy when households differ in their asset holdings and income processes. Using household-level survey data from China matched with regional monetary policy variation, I document that high-income households exhibit significantly smaller consumption responses to interest rate changes, while low-income households — who hold more illiquid assets — respond more strongly. A heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model calibrated to match Chinese household balance sheets quantitatively replicates these patterns and implies that the aggregate effect of monetary policy is substantially amplified relative to a representative-agent benchmark.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文研究当家庭在资产持有和收入流程方面存在差异时，货币政策冲击如何在经济中传导。利用中国家庭调查数据与区域货币政策变化的匹配，我发现高收入家庭对利率变化的消费反应显著更小，而持有更多非流动性资产的低收入家庭反应更强。以中国家庭资产负债表为校准基础的异质性主体新凯恩斯主义模型定量复现了上述规律，并表明相对于代表性主体基准，货币政策的总体效果被显著放大。

papers.title: Fiscal Multipliers under Debt Constraints: A HANK Approach
papers.abstract_en: I examine how government debt constraints shape the size of fiscal multipliers in a Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian (HANK) model. When the government faces a binding borrowing limit, the anticipation of future fiscal consolidation dampens the short-run stimulative effects of spending increases. Calibrated to the Chinese economy, the model predicts that fiscal multipliers are substantially smaller during high-debt episodes, consistent with empirical estimates across Chinese provinces.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文在异质性主体新凯恩斯主义（HANK）模型中研究政府债务约束如何影响财政乘数的大小。当政府面临具有约束力的借贷上限时，对未来财政整顿的预期会抑制支出增加在短期内的刺激效果。以中国经济为校准对象，模型预测高债务时期财政乘数显著更小，与各省经验估计相符。

papers.title: Business Cycle Asymmetry and Precautionary Savings in Emerging Economies
papers.abstract_en: This paper documents and explains a robust empirical regularity: output contractions in emerging economies are significantly deeper and more persistent than expansions. I argue that precautionary savings behavior, amplified by limited access to credit markets, generates this asymmetry. A quantitative model with incomplete markets and occasionally binding collateral constraints matches the asymmetric business cycle moments and delivers welfare costs of fluctuations that are three times larger than in symmetric-cycle economies.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文记录并解释了一个稳健的经验规律：新兴经济体的产出收缩显著深于且持续时间长于扩张。本文认为，被有限信贷市场准入所放大的预防性储蓄行为产生了这种非对称性。一个具有不完全市场和偶发性约束抵押品约束的定量模型与非对称商业周期矩相匹配，并给出了比对称周期经济体高三倍的波动福利成本。

notes.title_zh: 第二周：拉姆齐–卡斯–库普曼斯模型
第三周：真实商业周期理论
